---
name: Feature request
about: An idea that would make this better
labels: enhancement
---

**What do you want to ask your AI that you can't today?**

(The best feature requests are phrased as the question you'd type into chat.)

**Anything else?**

If this involves WHOOP data we don't expose yet, a link to the relevant
[WHOOP API docs](https://developer.whoop.com/api/) section helps a lot.
